import React from "react"; import '@fortawesome/free-regular-svg-icons' import { FontAwesomeIcon } from '@fortawesome/react-fontawesome'; import { faReact, faDocker, faPython } from '@fortawesome/free-brands-svg-icons'; import Chip from '@mui/material/Chip'; import '../assets/styles/Expertise.scss'; const labelsFirst = [ "Maven", "OpenGL", "X11", "C/C++", "Java", "Python", "CSS", "HTML", "PostgreSQL", "SQL", "Linux", "Windows", "MacOS", ]; const labelsSecond = [ "Git", "Docker", "Portainer", "Dockerfile", "Docker Compose", "Linux", "Shell Script (.sh)", "Makefile", "PowerShell Script (.ps1)", ]; function Expertise() { return (

Expertise

Software Engineer

Tech stack: {labelsFirst.map((label, index) => ( ))}

DevOps & Automation

Tech stack: {labelsSecond.map((label, index) => ( ))}
); } export default Expertise;
